title: Questions to ask Hideaki Anno once Rebuild 40 comes out
display_title: Questions to ask Hideaki Anno once Rebuild 40 comes out
wikitext:
[]: Questions to ask Hideaki Anno once Rebuild 4.0 comes out Post by riffraff11235 » Sun Aug 05, 2012 10:17 am Everyone who watches NGE inevitably has questions about the Evangeli-verse. The show is famous for leaving many things unsaid and up to the viewer's interpretation. Director Hideaki Anno is perhaps equally famous for staying relatively quiet about his controversial brain-child. Anno has made many statements to the effect of "I want everyone who watches NGE to come way with their own understanding of it." But I think he's talking more about the meaning of the show than about its technical aspects. I think one of the main reasons he hasn't answered questions about specifics of the series is so that he could keep is options open for Rebuild. Once Rebuild 4.0 is out, however, this pressure should be gone, and he should be at least a little more open to answering questions. With that said, the purpose of this thread is to compile questions that people would like "Word of God" input on. If you'd like to post a "just for laughs" question, please try to contribute a serious question beforehand. The question I'm most interested in answering is one that I've already made a thread about: Why did the Spear of Longinus stop at the throat of Eva-01 in End of Evangelion? Well... have at it, folks!

[]: Post by Justacrazyguy » Sun Aug 05, 2012 10:23 am Will Rei come back to the phisical world? I know people say that because she is in the "I´m like a god!" situation, it is unlikely for her to come back, but I would like to have an aswer from Anno himself. I also would like to ask him what drugs he took before making EoE.

[]: Post by SaVaGe » Sun Aug 05, 2012 2:17 pm How was Mari able to pilot 02 / Asuka able to pilot 03? What exactly was Yui's plan for Shinji?

[]: Post by TheFriskyIan » Sun Aug 05, 2012 2:25 pm How much 420 Puff Dandy Gonja did you have to smoke to come up with all this?

[]: Re: Questions to ask Hideaki Anno once Rebuild 4.0 comes out Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 05, 2012 4:05 pm A reminder: riffraff11235 wrote: If you'd like to post a "just for laughs" question, please try to contribute a serious question beforehand.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Sun Aug 05, 2012 4:25 pm I put this thread in "Evangelion Chit-Chat" because I wanted to leave it open to questions about both the original series/movies and Rebuild. But if a moderator thinks it's a better fit for the Rebuild sub-forum, I can't really argue. It's all good either way.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 05, 2012 6:09 pm Dunno who moved the thread into Rebuild subforum but it does fit. Forgot to address this earlier: SaVaGe wrote: How was Mari able to pilot 02 / Asuka able to pilot 03?

[]: Post by SaVaGe » Sun Aug 05, 2012 7:55 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: http://forum.evageeks.org/post/416030/Mari-Kaji-IPEA-Nerv-was-Eva-05s-plug-thingy/#416030

[]: Post by Warren Peace » Sun Aug 05, 2012 10:57 pm If it's not addressed in a future film: What the Hell is up with Tunniel!? Also: What the Hell do we call Tunniel!?

[]: Post by AR-99 » Mon Aug 06, 2012 4:52 pm What did you want to address in Rebuild but were not able to? (thus leaving the possibility open for another reboot, re-revival, reimagining, R whatever). As a followup: Will Evangelion ever be finished? Do you have any favorites among the various spinoffs?

[]: Post by ssguy » Sat Aug 18, 2012 8:46 pm I can't think of anything specific simply because Rebuild 4.0 isn't out yet. We aren't even at 3.0. Who knows what he may do for those movies? The only questions I can ask would be boring generic ones about the series as a whole, nothing about specific plot details that occurred or developmental decisions.

[]: Post by Jornophelanthas » Sun Aug 19, 2012 5:31 am Warren Peace wrote: Also: What the Hell do we call Tunniel!?

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 19, 2012 6:06 am Jornophelanthas wrote: Remember that all the Angels in Rebuild of Evangelion are indicated by numerals rather than Hebrew names, which were never mentioned in the Neon Genesis Evangelion series anyway (only in its documentation).

[]: Post by Bagheera » Sun Aug 19, 2012 8:52 am I think he's right about the NTE, though; if none of the Angels are named then I think we're out of luck re: names for the new arrivals. I think the question about whether or not Rei would come back would be a good one. I'd also ask if he was happy with the way things turned out (leaving that particular question open-ended -- NGE, NTE, everything, whatever). And of course, plans for the future.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Sun Aug 19, 2012 4:08 pm Jornophelanthas wrote: Finally, I must agree with the post above that we are only halfway through Rebuild, so perhaps some of our most vexing questions about the Rebuild universe will be answered by the time it will be completed.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Aug 19, 2012 4:17 pm I'd ask him again the dear old question, "what does Rei like?" . I'm curious to see if he finally discovered it after 15 years. Would he answer "Shinji's miso soup"? "Feeling poka-poka"?

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 19, 2012 6:15 pm Bagheera wrote: I think he's right about the NTE, though; if none of the Angels are named then I think we're out of luck re: names for the new arrivals.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Sun Aug 19, 2012 6:36 pm Reichu wrote: (...Kind of like this thread. Only a "what would you ask Anno about the original show?" thread works at this point, and one or more of those already exist. How can anyone really know what they'd want to ask him about NME after its conclusion, since, well, half of it isn't out yet?)

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 19, 2012 7:12 pm riffraff: My suggestion would be to keep NGE-related stuff to one of the preexisting threads (since NGE is a completed work and we know exactly what has and has not been answered), and to redirect this one along the lines, "What questions about NME do you hope to see eventually addressed (whether within the next two films, supplemental materials, or just 'in your dreams')?" The thread is just a mess the way it is now, regardless of what subforum it's stationed in.

[]: Post by Bagheera » Sun Aug 19, 2012 7:34 pm Reichu wrote: riffraff: My suggestion would be to keep NGE-related stuff to one of the preexisting threads (since NGE is a completed work and we know exactly what has and has not been answered), and to redirect this one along the lines, "What questions about NME do you hope to see eventually addressed (whether within the next two films, supplemental materials, or just 'in your dreams')?" The thread is just a mess the way it is now, regardless of what subforum it's stationed in.
